dict.string: Wawa Note shows your calendar events so you can start recordings with the right meeting context.
Wawa Note shows your calendar events so you can start recordings with the right meeting context.
Wawa Note creates reminders from your meeting action items so you can track follow-ups.
Wawa Note creates reminders from your meeting action items so you can track follow-ups.
Wawa Note uses the microphone to record meetings you choose to capture. Audio is saved on this iPhone.
Wawa Note records your location once when you start a recording so you can remember where it happened. Location data stays on your device.
Speech recognition is used to turn your recorded meetings into a searchable transcript.
Wawa Note uses the camera to scan documents and extract text. Scanned content stays on your device.
Wawa Note matches meeting speakers with your contacts to enrich project context. Contact data stays on your device.
Wawa Note uses Face ID to protect your knowledge workspace.
Wawa Note detects your motion activity to add context to your recordings (e.g., walking, driving). Motion data stays on your device.
Wawa Note checks your Focus mode to avoid interruptions while recording meetings.
